description: App commands the palette (`main`) webview is allowed to invoke: search, the paste/copy/delete/pin row actions, preview hydration, the AI action inspector, the status-bar capture toggle and Settings launcher, and the shared read-only stores (settings / permissions / capabilities / last hotkey failure). It deliberately omits every privileged settings/installer command (`update_settings`, `install_cli`, `request_accessibility`, the updater and semantic-index controls) so a compromised palette webview cannot reach them.
